creator: daniel.tihanyi@tetragir.com
text:
Created attachment 222919
sysutils/rundeck3 update to 3.3.9

Rundeck 3.3.9 is released, the new Makefile is attached. Besides the update, I also:
- Created a separate pkg-plist to install files and folders with a correct permission
- Install a log4j2 config file else Rundeck won't start

Rundeck 3.3.8 Release notes: https://docs.rundeck.com/docs/history/3_3_x/version-3.3.8.html
Rundeck 3.3.9 Release notes: https://docs.rundeck.com/docs/history/3_3_x/version-3.3.9.html#overview
